---
title: "f_contrast"
generated: true
description: "Per-element F-test of a multi-row contrast `C beta = 0`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:f_contrast -->
```python
f_contrast(result: GLMResult, contrast: Float[Array, 'm p'], *, cov: Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']] = None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], float, float]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:f_contrast -->
Per-element F-test of a multi-row contrast `C beta = 0`.

Returns `(F, p_value, df1, df2)` with `df1 = m` (contrast rank) and
`df2 = dof_resid`.

`cov` overrides the coefficient covariance (e.g. the robust
`sandwich_cov` output): the Wald quadratic form uses `C cov C^T` directly
and the statistic is `quad / m` (no dispersion rescale).  The default
(`None`) is the model-based `dispersion * (X^T W X)^{-1}` (unchanged).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:f_contrast -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | — |
| `contrast` | `Float` | `m` × `p` | — | — |
| `cov` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']]` | — | `None` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], float, float]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:f_contrast -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
